analysis.consistency: High. The data fields provided are consistent with standard D&D 5e spell stat blocks.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, includes scaling effects ('At Higher Levels'), and specifies exclusions ('undead or constructs').

mechanics.effect: Heals up to six creatures in a 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point within range. Healing is 3d8 + spellcasting modifier.
mechanics.scaling: Increases by 1d8 per spell slot level above 5th.
mechanics.target_limitation: Up to six creatures; does not affect undead or constructs.

analysis.recommendations: None needed. The data appears complete and mechanically sound.
